title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
